scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if ($p) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Freed port 5000' } else { Write-Host 'Port 5000 is free' }"
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
